Folks - it's Michele.
[I just got some (really!) good news about the Minnesota Senate race. But there’s bad news too. Let me explain.](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=5ba169fa761a4e57a2431b2473e16c84&_e=GDslCYRoNI5FhrkM-YX9VijYx9eSdCaEHZMCalkxdySFT6c6RKm5m0NgvTpQOfwXMGwf_T89K3ecbrbtpyFSrdBQzujygMmIcpRr0EK1A6cm1WUGwPfXLHajxCcO77pERQqVWkgeyG2mV9zflYjVzbxfqKSVjZOc5d_cqRaZcKWG-VDhgI0OiA6hyWeldJaLnNwbGT-s7hn-rjygwe3_hw0LkidsLTZgpbonqDYtWuhyt9JmdzmDRCh0fHHHepcwTRYM1ayhgjuhgjJY2UdeiAuEIp7LKWajBHoMl88NZk41-G077ObJS3abiIE418WfCer7QN2i90L8ipx3nHTTXgh1CcJ0Ywk4OSo7PtP1Q95AfOezrmY096FpZYU71fWh7CB6gxc5uwiT9DOAZKsVDWOcD0mFMDEWza5XEx0XQI0OvS1GWsaMsrl7OSqvZ2yjn6lKIWmozktz6_TnISe0lK-y8f9i5VSdrt1f-LjHtlZzSUqPjFeVk4tSGxRCnkxFRtQIgYU0ix0Dhh31Y4_bszqQ58deAzAAqjhwAkbdl8Sd8TkQZI7Dx_Xfyk--Kz6kJKRT8uqMCG3YeQjS2wJeK3L7B00cI_COJ5GsGrSrfmbHUs7JR7CCTSy99ApZ120bzVhUwsEItNxNngYWw92xl1_19k9Y_EuTucTFjJKZkqV8iIUXsuF0YqJStlBjRP_B78SJskorpHQq3EPz0GiC3eQZiApsYjBworvupoB834A3eZw7Ak5oAKbQXM3paWOY)
First, the bad news...
According to the latest FEC reports, we were outraised last quarter by our extreme far-Left opponent, Angie Craig. She raked in 2.5 million bucks from her army of mega-donors and political connections. She now has nearly 5 million dollars on hand to drag my name through the mud and lie about what I believe in.
Luckily, there's good news too:
It was close. Very close. We raised more than all our Republican opponents combined and finished up just shy of far-Left Angie Craig. I was proud of that - especially since I launched my campaign part of the way through the quarter!
The far Left is panicking for a reason. They know they're already on thin ice, having covered up unprecedented fraud in Minnesota, opening our borders to anyone and everyone, and crushing us with taxes and high costs.
America is fighting back. And Minnesota is ground zero.
[Between you and me – flipping this Senate seat will be an uphill battle. We have the message and the platform, but in order for that to be enough, we need to keep up the fundraising pace.](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=5ba169fa761a4e57a2431b2473e16c84&_e=GDslCYRoNI5FhrkM-YX9VijYx9eSdCaEHZMCalkxdySFT6c6RKm5m0NgvTpQOfwXMGwf_T89K3ecbrbtpyFSrdBQzujygMmIcpRr0EK1A6cm1WUGwPfXLHajxCcO77pERQqVWkgeyG2mV9zflYjVzbxfqKSVjZOc5d_cqRaZcKWG-VDhgI0OiA6hyWeldJaLnNwbGT-s7hn-rjygwe3_hw0LkidsLTZgpbonqDYtWuhyt9JmdzmDRCh0fHHHepcwTRYM1ayhgjuhgjJY2UdeiIca7kg2utM8WEdVjulhh8wUet9TbZrhSkqcyjMYEtfvOmJrqoXk6lAHzlCPAIwq7IcoDizcJVsl-tuz5NdjQxlwNpyJorhWosgPeBBAseNYtQ4vxkgUnjn2JdFv3wAIHP9JqWzYR7KFTZM_EpM8x2l0mdzVv1xkyFVyuH4dXjBZ8FbMYPlbElch2DuU_n_5lOheykNHrG-J0ewIKrGeF78ZCTnfYctNx-prsGJlyY2AfO4DRfpqPS1N087m8jRMf006WZt_ZqQbsSN5AQjtdAdoPTqAKYoCUAQ5ERaCUJ2KMiw-CeFMLhxGLKTVJk6ObT0ctr3CDkf1wj8yfnWfT5sLAqABShPSnruQgTwAcVOrf_JjR7ca4PITE9_ChIpLRLLjxrv6q5JuLspxSKZuqeIzZ24blVvfsJHq65aI8hjb7cX_JZXEOoa2xcw_7qStn3EAx58RmfYrAJK-6xj7IwuMXLaDiRSLT7tbOMYxGQe7)
If we fail, it's over. The far-Left wins.
We were just outraised by my opponent, but if enough sane, commonsense, regular folks step up today, we'll catch up and make history together. I'm counting on you to be one of them.
Please donate today - even a few bucks would be a huge help:

clean_body: Between you and me – flipping this Senate seat will be an uphill battle. | Folks - it's Michele. First, the bad news... According to the latest FEC reports, we were outraised last quarter by our extreme far-Left opponent, Angie Craig. She raked in 2.5 million bucks from her army of mega-donors and political connections. She now has nearly 5 million dollars on hand to drag my name through the mud and lie about what I believe in. Luckily, there's good news too: It was close. Very close. We raised more than all our Republican opponents combined and finished up just shy of far-Left Angie Craig. I was proud of that - especially since I launched my campaign part of the way through the quarter! The far Left is panicking for a reason. They know they're already on thin ice, having covered up unprecedented fraud in Minnesota, opening our borders to anyone and everyone, and crushing us with taxes and high costs. America is fighting back. And Minnesota is ground zero. If we fail, it's over. The far-Left wins. We were just outraised by my opponent, but if enough sane, commonsense, regular folks step up today, we'll catch up and make history together. I'm counting on you to be one of them. Please donate today - even a few bucks would be a huge help: | | | | | | | | Don't underestimate the impact you can make by donating any amount. This is shaping up to be one of the most important Senate races in the country. Whether your contribution is $5 or $500, each and every dollar matters here. So if you can afford to do so, please chip in what you can today. Thanks for all you do. I mean that. Be brave. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: AOC just endorsed Randy Villegas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Randy Villegas will be a fierce champion for the people of CA-22 in Congress.
That’s why Alexandria just endorsed him ahead of the primary election on June 2nd.
Randy is an educator, activist, and son of immigrants.
He grew up in Kern County, CA and personally understands the challenges and promises of the Central Valley. He’s running for Congress on the belief that everyone — regardless of zip code, SSN, or background — deserves a fair shot.
We have a special opportunity in CA-22 to flip this seat from red to blue **_and_** elect a progressive champion in November who will work alongside Alexandria for issues like Medicare for All and banning members of Congress from trading stocks.
But Randy has to first win the primary election in just 18 days.
[So please split a contribution between Randy Villegas and our campaign for progress today. Every single donation Randy’s campaign receives will allow him to reach more voters in this critical period before the primary election on June 2nd. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260515-villegas.Qw3Okq&refcode=em20260515-11440-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=11440%2E2526796%2EcUxiFC)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260515-villegas.Qw3Okq&refcode=em20260515-11440-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=11440%2E2526796%2EcUxiFC)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260515-villegas.Qw3Okq&refcode=em20260515-11440-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=11440%2E2526796%2EcUxiFC)**
Thank you for joining Alexandria in backing Randy today,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20260515-villegas?refcode=em20260515-11440-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&refcode2=11440_2526796_cUxiFC&akid=11440%2E2526796%2EcUxiFC)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20260515-11440-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=23&akid=11440%2E2526796%2EcUxiFC)**

# [Nakba day: a commemoration that deserves more attention](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=197926681&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk3OTI2NjgxLCJpYXQiOjE3Nzg4OTAzNDgsImV4cCI6MTc4MTQ4MjM0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YLPej8ePb8AuSxPDtIllSj_wCXuMgpaKUSnWZ6ZsQ74)
### Only a few decades ago, a zionist terror campaign displaced thousands of Palestinians, allowing an ongoing parade of horrors--including a continuing genocide relying on bipartisan support from the U.S.
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| May 16
---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=197926681&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk3OTI2NjgxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3ODg5MDM0OCwiZXhwIjoxNzgxNDgyMzQ4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BkgK_vXUqUrk8FOh0zoktIoLDU6gXGVRmfdsod4yjPM&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=197926681&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk3OTI2NjgxLCJpYXQiOjE3Nzg4OTAzNDgsImV4cCI6MTc4MTQ4MjM0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YLPej8ePb8AuSxPDtIllSj_wCXuMgpaKUSnWZ6ZsQ74)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/nakba-day-a-commemoration-that-deserves?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

My mother was quite fond of the adage that "those who cannot remember the past are condemned to repeat it." Coined [either](https://substack.com/redirect/46f6bd99-8c22-473a-8089-71d873879ce5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by Spanish-American philosopher George Santayana, Anglo-Irish philosopher Edmund Burke, or British statesman Winston Churchill, it indicates the importance of history as a tool to educate the present in order, one hopes, to enable a brighter future.
In retrospect, her death in 2016 at the hands of cancer may have been a blessing. If her illness hadn't driven her to her grave, the daily outrages invited by life under the current president would have likely done that, instead. She passed at a moment in history when the illusion of progress seemed more plausible, before the ensuing decade, for so many of us, irrevocably shattered that confidence.
Today offers a fitting reason to recall the past, particularly since decades of widespread ignorance have enabled a continuing series of horrifically stupid decisions that are actively destroying the future we all share.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends by sharing this post on any social media sites that you use._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=197926681&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk3OTI2NjgxLCJpYXQiOjE3Nzg4OTAzNDgsImV4cCI6MTc4MTQ4MjM0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YLPej8ePb8AuSxPDtIllSj_wCXuMgpaKUSnWZ6ZsQ74)
### **An annual commemoration rarely acknowledged in the West**
May 15 commemorates [Nakba Day](https://substack.com/redirect/ce41fd13-cc6e-4346-b107-1d91df643b68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and the forced expulsion of Palestinians from their ancestral homeland by Zionist terrorists in the 1940s.
When the Israeli genocide targeting Gaza accelerated in 2023, many of us struggled with how to convey the longstanding pattern preceding that. It behooves readers unfamiliar with the documented history to explore the roots of today's conflict. As painfully [explained](https://substack.com/@rashaaboujalal1/note/c-259403842?r=97w99) by Rasha Abou Jalal:
> More than 750,000 Palestinians were forcibly uprooted from their cities and villages and turned into refugees inside and outside their homeland. Zionist militias, followed later by the Israeli army, destroyed more than 530 Palestinian towns and villages, wiping entire neighborhoods off the map while committing dozens of massacres that forced people to flee in fear for their lives.
> The Nakba was not only the theft of land, but an attempt to uproot the Palestinian people from their memory, identity, and right to life itself....
> Today, as Palestinians commemorate the Nakba, the people of Gaza are living through another chapter of the same tragedy. Since October 2023, more than two million Palestinians have been subjected to forced displacement under bombardment, siege, and starvation, with entire families repeatedly fleeing in search of safety that does not truly exist.
> The scenes lived by grandparents in 1948 are being repeated today before the eyes of the world...children sleeping in tents, and cities reduced to rubble. The only difference is that today the world watches everything unfold live, in sound and image.
> The Nakba did not end in 1948. It continues in different forms to this day....
### **A continuing history suppressed for too long**
Nakba Day is a fitting day to remember this widely suppressed history, particularly in the wake of a [recent (and long overdue) report](https://substack.com/redirect/c3dd03f5-09a6-45e3-b0a8-7e711f21f5ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in The New York Times documenting the use of torture and rape by Israel against Palestinian civilians, including women and children. (The article is also available on [other sites](https://substack.com/redirect/408d8a30-20e9-43b3-bdbc-1d347db09c2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that do not require a paywall)
The report is nightmarish, but it behooves every person of conscience to grapple with the terrifying reality of human rights abuses routinely committed by Israel with bipartisan support from Washington:
> Palestinians have recounted...a pattern of widespread Israeli sexual violence against men, women and even children -- by soldiers, settlers, interrogators in the Shin Bet internal security agency and, above all, prison guards....
> [Israeli leaders] have built a security apparatus where sexual violence has become, as a United Nations report [put it last year](https://substack.com/redirect/f4fea09b-c106-470d-91a4-a017ba790fa5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), one of Israel's "standard operating procedures" and "a major element in the ill treatment of Palestinians." A [report out last month](https://substack.com/redirect/b6b5d72a-ad42-4074-8edd-587cad5b7912?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), from the Euro-Med Human Rights Monitor, a Geneva-based advocacy group...concludes that Israel employs "systematic sexual violence" that is "widely practiced as part of an organized state policy."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b10992f1-a728-4922-8d6e-afd8d8f20393?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The cover of the Euro-Med Human Rights Monitor to which Kristof linked in his revealing NYT article
What Nicholas Kristof documents is frankly horrifying, but even more horrifying is the disturbing reality that these abuses have been going on for years, enabled by support from Washington in which [both of America's fascist political parties](https://substack.com/redirect/cebb84f5-dd51-40ee-9f44-2ac243666843?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have been thoroughly complicit--even to [their own detriment](https://substack.com/redirect/d86b8dd9-a92f-4867-826d-d83c35dbdf19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
### **There is more to this tragic --and continuing--story**
I hope to write at further length in the coming days to explore more layers to this story, including:
* how Israeli propaganda has long dominated American "news" media
* how the U.S. has long followed a path similar to that taken by Israel more recently
* how Americans have been among the casualties of Israeli belligerence
* how the struggle to define history has sparked everything from lawsuits and direct action to wars and regime change
* how the Nakba continues today through the ongoing Israeli genocide in Gaza
* how the Israeli genocide in Gaza relates to the economic collapse unfolding across the U.S. invited by Netanyahu & Trump's unprovoked war on Iran

While I hope to explore those topics in my next post, I wanted to make sure this one got finished in time to publish today, before I head to work. Thanks to all the subscribers who support my writing and allow me the privilege to focus some of my time on these crucially important issues!

Only a few decades ago, a zionist terror campaign displaced thousands of Palestinians, allowing an ongoing parade of horrors--including a continuing genocide relying on bipartisan support from the U.S. | | | May 16 | | | | | | | | | | | | My mother was quite fond of the adage that "those who cannot remember the past are condemned to repeat it." Coined by Spanish-American philosopher George Santayana, Anglo-Irish philosopher Edmund Burke, or British statesman Winston Churchill, it indicates the importance of history as a tool to educate the present in order, one hopes, to enable a brighter future. In retrospect, her death in 2016 at the hands of cancer may have been a blessing. If her illness hadn't driven her to her grave, the daily outrages invited by life under the current president would have likely done that, instead. She passed at a moment in history when the illusion of progress seemed more plausible, before the ensuing decade, for so many of us, irrevocably shattered that confidence. Today offers a fitting reason to recall the past, particularly since decades of widespread ignorance have enabled a continuing series of horrifically stupid decisions that are actively destroying the future we all share. Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends by sharing this post on any social media sites that you use. An annual commemoration rarely acknowledged in the West May 15 commemorates , and the forced expulsion of Palestinians from their ancestral homeland by Zionist terrorists in the 1940s. When the Israeli genocide targeting Gaza accelerated in 2023, many of us struggled with how to convey the longstanding pattern preceding that. It behooves readers unfamiliar with the documented history to explore the roots of today's conflict. As painfully by Rasha Abou Jalal: More than 750,000 Palestinians were forcibly uprooted from their cities and villages and turned into refugees inside and outside their homeland. Zionist militias, followed later by the Israeli army, destroyed more than 530 Palestinian towns and villages, wiping entire neighborhoods off the map while committing dozens of massacres that forced people to flee in fear for their lives. The Nakba was not only the theft of land, but an attempt to uproot the Palestinian people from their memory, identity, and right to life itself.... Today, as Palestinians commemorate the Nakba, the people of Gaza are living through another chapter of the same tragedy. Since October 2023, more than two million Palestinians have been subjected to forced displacement under bombardment, siege, and starvation, with entire families repeatedly fleeing in search of safety that does not truly exist. The scenes lived by grandparents in 1948 are being repeated today before the eyes of the world...children sleeping in tents, and cities reduced to rubble. The only difference is that today the world watches everything unfold live, in sound and image. The Nakba did not end in 1948. It continues in different forms to this day.... A continuing history suppressed for too long Nakba Day is a fitting day to remember this widely suppressed history, particularly in the wake of a in The New York Times documenting the use of torture and rape by Israel against Palestinian civilians, including women and children. (The article is also available on that do not require a paywall) The report is nightmarish, but it behooves every person of conscience to grapple with the terrifying reality of human rights abuses routinely committed by Israel with bipartisan support from Washington: Palestinians have recounted...a pattern of widespread Israeli sexual violence against men, women and even children -- by soldiers, settlers, interrogators in the Shin Bet internal security agency and, above all, prison guards.... [Israeli leaders] have built a security apparatus where sexual violence has become, as a United Nations report , one of Israel's "standard operating procedures" and "a major element in the ill treatment of Palestinians." Friend: There are _only a few hours_ left until my mid-month deadline at midnight — **and I still need to raise another $1,826 to reach this critical goal.**

_**[Will you please rush a gift right now to help power my campaign to become Governor of New Mexico?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8180?refcode=jtk707-fr-nd&t=2&akid=9590%2E400544%2Ewz9loG)**_
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8180?refcode=jtk707-fr-nd&t=3&akid=9590%2E400544%2Ewz9loG)
---
Right now, all eyes are on our gubernatorial race in New Mexico, as the GOP prepares to spend big to flip this seat. And that's because they know, just as well as we do, that New Mexico’s governorship tends to flip parties every eight years — **and they’re coming for this seat right on schedule**.
We cannot back down without a fierce fight, friend.
**I'm in this race to lower costs, invest in education, and make healthcare more accessible and affordable. I am also ready to be a brick wall to Donald Trump and his administration when they want to sow violence and fear and drag an extremist agenda to our state. But I can't win in 2026 and deliver on these promises without your support.**
**_[Please, will you chip in whatever you can spare before tonight's midnight deadline so we can win this race and deliver progress for New Mexico's working families?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8180?refcode=jtk707-fr-nd&t=4&akid=9590%2E400544%2Ewz9loG)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8180?refcode=jtk707-fr-nd&t=5&akid=9590%2E400544%2Ewz9loG)
---
Thank you for your support, friend.

Be fierce,
Deb

name: Team Kelly
subject: I just need a minute of your time
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friend --
I’m not going to waste your time here: At the end of this email, I’m going to ask you for a donation.
But before I do, I know I owe you an explanation for why.
So, here’s the truth:
Today is the halfway point to our official FEC deadline. When that deadline hits, we’ll be legally required to report how much we’ve raised AND the number of donations we received online. It’s all going to be public.
Everyone will be watching — the press, our opponents, and our allies as well. With Hegseth continuing to come after me, they all want to know if we can put together the kind of team we’ll need to face off against Trump and the entire Executive Branch.
Today, the 15th, is the midpoint to that FEC deadline. What we raise today will determine whether we’re on track to hit our goals and have everything we need to stand up to these attacks. We can’t afford to miss those goals. We have to show strength, because that’s the only thing people like Trump understand.
That’s why I’m writing you, and this is the part where I humbly ask:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to my campaign? It would give me real peace of mind to know we’re on track to hit our goals before we’re legally required to report those numbers.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-may26.8vozgy&refcode=em260515-2-180-90&t=1&akid=6459%2E6688874%2ECjlcPl)

name: Crystal & Jason via ActionNetwork.org
subject: News from the Front Lines: Pipeline Resistance, Rights of Nature & Upcoming Fundraisers
body:
Let's have some fund with mini golf and a guessing game while we are fighting fossil fuel expansion, organizing for Rights of Nature, and building community support across North Carolina. | | | News from the Front Lines
## 7 Directions of Service Community Newsletter
As fossil fuel infrastructure rapidly expands across North Carolina and the Southeast, 7 Directions of Service continues to stand on the front lines of environmental justice, Indigenous sovereignty, and community protection. Our organizing is grounded in relationship-building, cultural revitalization, and the creation of long-term shifts toward Indigenous visions of justice, sustainability, and collective care. Through coalition-building across race, class, and geography, we continue working to create healthy, affordable, and just communities for future generations.
## Fighting Fossil Fuel Expansion
Our Fossil Fuel Team remains actively engaged in resistance efforts against major infrastructure projects, including:
* Transco’s Southeast Supply Enhancement Project (SSEP)
* Mountain Valley Pipeline Southgate Extension
* New gas plants and fossil fuel buildout tied to hyperscale data centers
* Duke Energy’s expanding gas infrastructure plans

Currently, construction related to SSEP is affecting land, forests, waterways, and communities in Rockingham, Guilford, and Forsyth Counties as pipeline installation continues across the region. At the same time, we are organizing around emerging threats associated with massive data center expansion and the growing energy demands that are fueling new fossil fuel infrastructure across North Carolina. From Stokes County to Chatham County, 7 Directions of Service continues to build strong, multi-racial, cross-class coalitions rooted in environmental justice and Indigenous leadership.
## Rights of Nature Organizing Across North Carolina
As we prepare to lobby for Rights of Nature legislation again in February 2027, our team is traveling across North Carolina to educate towns, counties, organizations, and community members about the Rights of Nature movement. Through workshops, presentations, community conversations, and coalition-building, we are helping communities imagine legal systems that recognize the inherent rights of rivers, ecosystems, and the natural world to exist, flourish, and regenerate.
## Community Fundraisers Supporting the Movement
As grassroots organizers, we know that sustaining this work requires community support. To help offset funding gaps and build long-term sustainability, we have several upcoming fundraisers and community events.
### The Great Guessing Jar Fundraiser
📅 May 16 – June 16, 2026
Try your luck and support Indigenous-led environmental justice work by participating in our community guessing game fundraiser! 🎟 Participate Here:
[The Great Guessing Jar Fundraiser](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.xqm-apKpWqGuZCDDu9wrxQJvqq150s7idT6evB1GRadGPB3V3AGJG4QB5FLyEQg5WOb7hhwYxU-dzfLO6dxqYu5MfnYJj8YeuoiyfMGgK_GC5BlhRgytm-xrwRI0jeSe-hhGxROj9JaHTYc44wXUUjbRpyoRaojICrHjKzEuG9Ps6_70eKxtxaCfnWiaKB5Q5-5cfI8KPcVVhNQRCi4vSzi1gVVVKTSiZHJx9QvEvwE2-J9hxDYf0yz48rA-Um6lYPVFDeeXJB8aMJaHNWV0KVo4rRDvUXaXk966zyLzlIygH53ArtU7f8Uly48YpO_qV5TeTdzzs2wt7vUf7sjnFWd53PlJr88akopEO8CPm2Q/4qo/IFfBZTWOT664jdYp06_YtQ/h0/h001.p_uUPJLNKDSXRgEBXHk3qouo3AFZfMkNFJh7Mu3INRU)
### Putting for People, Water, and Land
⛳ Mini Golf Fundraiser In Pleasant Grove
📅 Sunday, July 19, 2026 @ 1:45 PM EDT Join us for a fun-filled afternoon of mini golf, raffles, prizes, community connection, and fundraising in support of Indigenous-led environmental justice, youth programming, traditional ecological knowledge, and community wellness initiatives. Gather your friends and family and come putt for a purpose! 🎟 Register Here:
[Putting for People, Water, and Land](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.xqm-apKpWqGuZCDDu9wrxUxj70nxM2EgdFl68eE_IKyrOzXPkAu0f8pyhd0YqYpnz-ewMlF3DbK3UaHbZpME68Qs_TBaZircS65vPKgEhplT1z_L6AhSlcNaEs4ZHRa-XX6my7MSeXYxYMiM9hkHa98BcQ4akrWBvV3H8HPWPLLeo9JDXRM8eZvH9W2WsIQ_Df8Eurb0EIPcbBl39_QwRUe2-FLQg_Et2AzwjTu38RCElRoZzmYgI1sE8EdKV-WuC330gkQt5TT15kFf40mWil3OmnntOeDoMxXQh3c5m4jIZ0-BXFrmmHAIhg9yBdf4k9hF5rl073C4Y9miAFfRdznzN_Sn2AmUeEHdQNPGXnPv-3AzLoGXQvRwpEGDumUA/4qo/IFfBZTWOT664jdYp06_YtQ/h1/h001.QpAmDd5aEeLzTjGeYozvVOHZ2q50YHslZnwMJd4k-no)
### Rooted in Motion Virtual 5K
📅 June 26 – July 3, 2026 Rooted in Motion is a virtual movement challenge supporting:
* Indigenous-led environmental justice initiatives
* Cultural revitalization programs
* Youth leadership
* Food sovereignty efforts
* Community healing work

Participants can join from anywhere by walking, running, biking, hiking, paddling, rolling, or moving in ways that are accessible to them. This event is designed to be inclusive, family-friendly, community-centered, and accessible to people of all ability levels. 🎟 Register Here:
[Rooted in Motion Virtual 5K](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZhC1Z9oS-UN3IQX48ADMBk0CKraH3diUasfDmKSRwfYZdEhTJsSXfBu0fQWDVYEe3orCTr2Ta5ybI_LE1fKrNQlmXJ5JkBzrMtIxusrSr5Qkq5PIMjJcujHFbpBijdwN9qR6DIE05OJHAlwofE8VY7zNVG6Evx6Fb8NhNhJaDpkVHCHXTNAhTewWAPCZmdFGCMKQZ-y5WIQ6Cyxv1IoBTcVIJyef8VfnDDIBY214DZ09GpempHzRhg6rBTcNuZywCriw3wAgPvHV49oVq3n1ySmcP9kHjq1a81kgd5OYU0iupV0XVO2IvoJUPjqw26MJDpX8oY7yy2trkGmEVfnIabA/4qo/IFfBZTWOT664jdYp06_YtQ/h2/h001.60EULkQIuM7aNvn-XVaJgE92-aIGKd372hF86Zekrxk)
### Silent Auction Fundraiser
📅 July 10 – August 10, 2026 We will also be launching an online Silent Auction featuring community donations, local businesses, Indigenous artists, gift baskets, experiences, and more. Stay tuned for additional details and ways to participate! Together, we continue building a future rooted in justice, healing, and collective care. With gratitude,
Crystal & Jason
---

NOW: The Supreme Court just SHREDDED the Voting Rights Act of 1965, which protected the right to vote for millions! 30% of our CBC Members could lose their seats! That’s why we’re launching a $200,000 Voting Rights Fund to ensure our Black Democrats nationwide can fight back against this voter suppression scheme! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Congressional Black Caucus PAC and VPP will go through immediately: This is a make-or-break moment. The key to defeating Donald Trump and his Republicans in 2026 is with a massive wave of Democratic turnout — especially Black voters! 🔵 Black voters helped us FLIP ruby red states like Georgia – TWICE! 🔵 Black voters elected two Black women as Senators to serve together for the first time in HISTORY. 🔴 But Black voter turnout was DOWN in 2024. We’re the experts at mobilizing Black voters, but our donations to boost Black voter turnout took a NOSEDIVE at the worst possible time! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Congressional Black Caucus PAC and VPP will go through immediately: Need you with us in this fight, Congressional Black Caucus PAC 878179 | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. clean_body: I promised fellow Republican leaders a response from Peter. And I would NEVER not follow through on a promise. From when I took an oath to our country as a Marine to my swearing in as Vice President, I take my word seriously. There's a lot of people in the swamp who like to make empty promises. I 'm proud to say that I'm not one of them. When I say something, I mean it. So when I promised my fellow Republicans I'd have your responses ready, I was ready to go to any length to get them. I look forward to reading your responses, JD Vance Vice President of the United States Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: The stakes couldn’t be higher.

body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/75562F6666466C487461444F4457705833526B7456693474564B36734A6F5061574E65434E4D35712B554A47547457644C6E4D3177765244444D664E34727249/editor_images/Screen%20Shot%202026-02-26%20at%209.05.09%20AM.png]
Last year, Pete Hegseth shamelessly removed Nancy Lacore from her position as Chief of Navy Reserve.
She was a three-star vice admiral with thirty-five years of service and thousands of sailors under her command, but they just showed her to the door for NO REASON.
That tells you everything you need to know about Republicans’ hare-brained leadership. Experience and integrity don’t matter if you don’t fall in line.
But everyday folks are tired of this chaos. They’re exhausted by the noise. And they’re FED UP with Republican leaders who prioritize pageantry over delivering real results.
Luckily, Nancy’s running for Congress to restore honor, integrity, and commitment.
She’s the leader we deserve – we NEED – in South Carolina’s First District. And if you’re serious about flipping the House and restoring integrity in Congress, will you split $25 to support Nancy’s campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
DONATE NOW TO HELP NANCY FLIP THIS SEAT! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
Pete Hegseth made a massive mistake in removing Nancy Lacore.
And it’s going to backfire – BIG TIME.
Because SC-01 will be one of the most competitive battlegrounds in the country this cycle. This race could easily decide control of Congress.
Luckily, Nancy isn’t the type to back down from a challenge.
She has the grit, discipline, and credibility to not only win this race but deliver for South Carolina.
And Republicans are going to throw serious money into this race for that reason. That’s why grassroots support matters so much. The stakes couldn’t be higher.
So, I’ll ask again: will you split a donation of $25, $50, or whatever you can spare between Resist Reclaim Rebuild and Nancy’s campaign to help them flip this must-win seat and help take back the House? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
CHIP IN TO DEFEAT PETE HEGSETH'S ROTTEN SCHEME! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
They tried to push her out. Let’s send her to Congress instead.
– James Carville

name: David Seligman
subject: RE: Tina Peters—Polis just caved to Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seligman for AG,
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-26q2?refcode=x_260515_tinapeters_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-26q2?refcode=x_260515_tinapeters_act]
Today, Governor Polis decided to commute the sentence of Tina Peters, an election denier who was convicted of criminal charges after trying to prove Trump’s Big Lie.
Tina Peters wasn’t targeted unfairly. She was found guilty of seven felonies after undermining trust in our elections and violating the law. A Mesa County jury of her peers heard the evidence and delivered a verdict. That’s how justice is supposed to work.
But then Trump got involved, calling for her to be released and threatening to withhold federal funding from Colorado if she stayed in prison. And now Polis has caved to that pressure campaign.
It’s outrageous. This is not how justice should be served .
Polis just weakened the power of the state law to hold people accountable, and sent a dangerous message: that powerful people can escape accountability if they have the right political connections.
Will you chip in today to help us build a campaign strong enough to take on Trump’s allies, fight political corruption wherever it exists, and defend the rule of law without fear or favor? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-26q2?refcode=x_260515_tinapeters_act]

I’m running for attorney general because Colorado deserves someone willing to take on a rigged system and stand up to anyone, Republican or Democrat, who sells out working people and undermines our democracy. We will not bend to the powerful, no matter what.
– David

name: R. Cooper (via Cooper Victory Fund)
subject: Last call
body:
| | | | |
---
Hi, Peter. I’m reaching out one more time before midnight to ask for your support in reaching our crucial $250,000 mid-month goal. If that’s all you need to hear, please add your donation at the link below:
**[https:/secure.actblue.com/donate](https://act.roycooper.com/go/11252?t=2&akid=1411%2E124072%2EDS469Q)**
Senate control is at stake here in North Carolina, and our race has been ranked by experts at Inside Elections as the only Toss-Up Senate seat currently held by a Republican. That’s why the GOP is planning to pour nearly $100 million into this race to defeat me – and it’s why the president is personally attacking me. I can’t fight back without people like you chipping in at important moments like this.
**Please, this is the last call:** Will you donate now (before the midnight deadline) to help us reach our goal, flip NC blue and take back the Senate? **[https:/secure.actblue.com/donate](https://act.roycooper.com/go/11252?t=3&akid=1411%2E124072%2EDS469Q)**
The amount doesn’t matter nearly as much as the contribution itself. Thank you.
Roy Cooper
Sent from my iPhone
| |
* * *
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=1&akid=1411%2E124072%2EDS469Q)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal.
---

By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1411%2E124072%2EDS469Q)

name: Rose Penelope Yee
subject: This message from a voter inspired me
body:
I swell with pride when I get messages like thee from voters.

| | | | | [|
---](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=ddc017158d&e=8c53948e4c)
| | | | | |
# This Message Inspired Me
---
| | Hello friends,
I got this text from a voter in our District yesterday:
---
| | _Good Luck Rose_ 🌹 _One of the things that impressed me most about you is the strength to speak truth to power.__Not only do you call it like it is... ya don't blink...__-Roy_
---
| | I’m in this race for voters like Roy because District 2 needs a representative who leads with moral clarity, conviction, and courage, and who **answers only to you** , not corporate or foreign interests.
I’m in this fight for Roy, for you, for working families whose welfare and wellbeing should always be put first and not those of billionaires or war profiteers.
But I need you with me on this fight.
**Can you volunteer for a few hours or donate a few dollars today to boost our campaign across the finish line?**

subject: Your membership is on its last leg..

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Tina Peters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Lawlessness only breeds more lawlessness.
| | |
---
Friend, I was furious when I read this:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131491543/621314051/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1432-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmQ1YjRiZC1jNDUwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FXzOVn90fWRJKm-Jm8KWo-n7yuA9wPwdFHfbKih0AQU=)
Tina Peters knowingly broke the law, undermined our elections, and was rightfully convicted by a jury of her peers.
I vehemently disagree with Gov. Polis’s decision to commute her sentence.
Lawlessness only breeds more lawlessness. With Trump continuing to attack Colorado, we must stand strong for our institutions and the rule of law.
Tina Peters can never be allowed anywhere near our election system again.
**And with your support to win the governor's race, I’ll see to it that she never is.**
**[As our next governor, I’m committed to elevating Colorado as the model for upholding our nation's founding values of democracy and accountability. If you're with me, friend, will you pitch in a few bucks to help me win this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131491544/621314052/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1432-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmQ1YjRiZC1jNDUwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FXzOVn90fWRJKm-Jm8KWo-n7yuA9wPwdFHfbKih0AQU=)**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: What just happened (incredible)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
| Inside Elections upgraded our chances of winning
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2269%2E259176%2EZ7GLmt) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2269%2E259176%2EZ7GLmt)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11561?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.15_Brown-Inside-Elections_B5_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=4&akid=2269%2E259176%2EZ7GLmt) I have important news, Peter: **_Inside Elections_ just shifted our race in our direction – a few days after experts at _The Cook Political Report_ moved our race to “Toss Up.”** [**The momentum behind our campaign is surging, and I need folks like you to chip in $10, split between my campaign and Blue Amp Action, to keep it going. Will you rush a donation so we can win in Ohio and flip the Senate?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11561?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.15_Brown-Inside-Elections_B5_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=5&akid=2269%2E259176%2EZ7GLmt) | | [DONATE](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11561?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.15_Brown-Inside-Elections_B5_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=6&akid=2269%2E259176%2EZ7GLmt)
---
**I am National Republicans' top target to beat and this new expert rating is going to pull even more attention toward our race.** They've already launched false attack ads against me – and now, they’re dumping $80 MILLION into Ohio to flood the airwaves with even more lies. It’s their biggest investment in the entire country.
This new rating proves we’re running a winning campaign. **But it also paints a bigger target on our backs.** Especially with more polls showing me caught in a dead heat against my opponent.
Take it from me – these race ratings always lead to a surge in Republican spending. When they see campaigns like ours gaining traction, they get scared. And with Senate control on the line, they’ll pour an ocean of money into Ohio to win.
We don’t know what’s coming next, but we need today to be a record-breaking fundraising day. **That’s why my team and I set a rapid-response goal to raise $300,000 before midnight – and I’m counting on your support to show the GOP what we’re made of.**
Polls don’t win elections. Votes do. And the only thing that matters on Election Day is if we’re able to reach enough voters directly and share our message in time.
[**So if you’ve been waiting for the perfect time to make a donation to help us win in Ohio and flip the Senate, today is the day. Please, Peter, will you chip in to my campaign and Blue Amp Action right now?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11561?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.15_Brown-Inside-Elections_B5_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=7&akid=2269%2E259176%2EZ7GLmt)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_

Thanks for being part of this movement.
Sherrod

Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country.

name: DNC HQ
subject: One last ask
body:
---
Derek, Our mid-month fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight — and we’re so close to reaching our $300,000 goal. We’re so grateful for the support of this grassroots team — we wouldn’t be here without the thousands of Democrats who invested in our work this month. **But with only a few hours until our mid-month deadline, we have to ask:** [**Can you make your first donation of the month right now to help get us across the finish line?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-mid-month?amount=7&refcode=em_20260515_7144_fr&refcode2=7144_22930333_pgykO_&akid=7144%2E22930333%2EpgykO_) **[RUSH $7 NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-mid-month?amount=7&refcode=em_20260515_7144_fr&refcode2=7144_22930333_pgykO_&akid=7144%2E22930333%2EpgykO_)** Thank you, Derek, for your continued support. We’re grateful to have you in the fight with us. — The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Kat Abughazaleh
subject: Coming to you for your support at a difficult time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi Peter, this is Kat Abughazaleh.

I’m the journalist and researcher who recently ran for Congress in
Illinois’ 9th district with the help of Justice Democrats. We didn’t win
our primary, but thanks to grassroots momentum from people like you,
neither did AIPAC’s candidate.

I’m coming to you now to ask for your support again at a difficult time.

In October 2025, I – along with my field director and friend Andre Martin
and four other individuals – was indicted for my advocacy and protest
against ICE and the Trump administration.

[ https://www.gofundme.com/f/stand-with-kat-and-andre-against-unjust-prosecution?utm_source=jd-em-20260515-2 ]Image of Andre Martin and Kat Abughazaleh sitting in protest holding
two poster signs; Andre's sign says 'ICE/CPB HIRING OF MORE FASCISTS TO
ASSAULT CHICAGO? HELL NO!'; Kat's sign says: 'IMMIGRANTS ARE WELCOME HERE.
FASCISTS AREN'T'

Even though we plan on winning, the two of us are facing up to $250,000 in
legal debt, along with the immense stress and pressure the last six months
has put on us and our loved ones. Yes, that is how much cases like this
can cost — and honestly, it’s at the low end of the spectrum, especially
for two separate incredible legal teams.

But that’s the point of lawfare like this: for the government to be able
to scare us into silence through not just possible jail time but financial
and psychological torture.

Our case, United States v. Rabbitt, is set to go to trial in Chicago
federal court on May 26, and the result could determine the future of our
constitutional right to free association. These charges are bogus, but
regardless of the outcome, the stress, public scrutiny, and financial
burdens of this ordeal have forever changed our lives.

Throughout my congressional campaign, I was not just vocal against Donald
Trump's secret police — I put my body and reputation on the line during
protests. Even if you don’t know my face, you probably saw the video of an
ICE agent throwing me to the ground last September. That is not what we
were charged for, but it shows what the conditions at Broadview were often
like for protestors.

As we have said from the beginning, dissent and protest are not a
conspiracy. After lengthy legal battles, the government dismissed the
felony conspiracy charge just weeks before trial. But they did not dismiss
all the charges, and we still have trial on the misdemeanor counts for
intimidating, interfering, and impeding an ICE agent. And by winning our
case, we can give future defendants a path to victory, ensuring no one
else has to go through this without precedent.

Since Andre and I have worked in the nonprofit sector and progressive
politics our entire adult lives, we don’t have hundreds of thousands (much
less mere thousands) of dollars to spare. The costs have mounted beyond
our expectations.

Even if – or rather, when – we win our trial, our lives and futures will
still be left in disarray through the financial and psychological burdens
of our legal system.

[ https://www.gofundme.com/f/stand-with-kat-and-andre-against-unjust-prosecution?utm_source=jd-em-20260515-2 ]If you are someone who cares about the Constitution and First
Amendment, hates what Donald Trump and his cronies are doing to this
country, and has the resources to aid us in our fight against this unjust
prosecution, we are asking for your help: will you contribute any amount
to stand with Andre and me today?

[ https://www.gofundme.com/f/stand-with-kat-and-andre-against-unjust-prosecution?utm_source=jd-em-20260515-2 ]Contribute →

All contributions will go to our legal defense, personal debt accrued over
the past 6 months in an effort to pay our lawyers, and anything left will
go to the National Lawyers Guild, which helped us find our (fantastic!!)
representation and protects our First Amendment rights every single day
through representation, jail support, and trained legal observers.

Thank you to everyone who supported us over the last 6 months. And thank
you for helping us win.

In solidarity,

Kat

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Hi Peter, this is Kat Abughazaleh. I’m the journalist and researcher who recently ran for Congress in Illinois’ 9th district with the help of Justice Democrats. We didn’t win our primary, but thanks to grassroots momentum from people like you, neither did AIPAC’s candidate. I’m coming to you now to ask for your support again at a difficult time. In October 2025, I – along with my field director and friend Andre Martin and four other individuals – was indicted for my advocacy and protest against ICE and the Trump administration. [ ]Image of Andre Martin and Kat Abughazaleh sitting in protest holding two poster signs; Andre's sign says 'ICE/CPB HIRING OF MORE FASCISTS TO ASSAULT CHICAGO? HELL NO!'; Kat's sign says: 'IMMIGRANTS ARE WELCOME HERE. FASCISTS AREN'T' Even though we plan on winning, the two of us are facing up to $250,000 in legal debt, along with the immense stress and pressure the last six months has put on us and our loved ones. Yes, that is how much cases like this can cost — and honestly, it’s at the low end of the spectrum, especially for two separate incredible legal teams. But that’s the point of lawfare like this: for the government to be able to scare us into silence through not just possible jail time but financial and psychological torture. Our case, United States v. Rabbitt, is set to go to trial in Chicago federal court on May 26, and the result could determine the future of our constitutional right to free association. These charges are bogus, but regardless of the outcome, the stress, public scrutiny, and financial burdens of this ordeal have forever changed our lives. Throughout my congressional campaign, I was not just vocal against Donald Trump's secret police — I put my body and reputation on the line during protests. Even if you don’t know my face, you probably saw the video of an ICE agent throwing me to the ground last September. That is not what we were charged for, but it shows what the conditions at Broadview were often like for protestors. As we have said from the beginning, dissent and protest are not a conspiracy. After lengthy legal battles, the government dismissed the felony conspiracy charge just weeks before trial. But they did not dismiss all the charges, and we still have trial on the misdemeanor counts for intimidating, interfering, and impeding an ICE agent. And by winning our case, we can give future defendants a path to victory, ensuring no one else has to go through this without precedent. Since Andre and I have worked in the nonprofit sector and progressive politics our entire adult lives, we don’t have hundreds of thousands (much less mere thousands) of dollars to spare. The costs have mounted beyond our expectations. Even if – or rather, when – we win our trial, our lives and futures will still be left in disarray through the financial and psychological burdens of our legal system. [ ]If you are someone who cares about the Constitution and First Amendment, hates what Donald Trump and his cronies are doing to this country, and has the resources to aid us in our fight against this unjust prosecution, we are asking for your help: will you contribute any amount to stand with Andre and me today? [ ]Contribute → All contributions will go to our legal defense, personal debt accrued over the past 6 months in an effort to pay our lawyers, and anything left will go to the National Lawyers Guild, which helped us find our (fantastic!!) representation and protects our First Amendment rights every single day through representation, jail support, and trained legal observers. Thank you to everyone who supported us over the last 6 months. And thank you for helping us win. In solidarity, Kat Contribute to Justice Democrats:

It's late, and frankly I'm up because Tennessee deserves a candidate who shows up the old fashioned way. After hours speaking with real people over real issues... I can't help but stay up thinking of the solutions our current politicians refuse to come up with.
**That 's my motivation to flip this seat. **No consultants. No algorithms. No pollster telling me what you want to hear. All it takes for me is just a living room, some good people, and an honest conversation about what is happening to our communities and what we are going to do about it.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/81a3b48e-c368-419b-9e79-d2b09f0d1f3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Every week, we gather in a different corner of the district for one of my favorite parts of this campaign: our house meetings. The kind where you pull up a chair, look people in the eye, and actually listen. No teleprompter. Just neighbors who care about Tennessee sitting down together and talking about what matters.
This is how campaigns used to be run, and I think it is how they should still be run, because you deserve a candidate who puts in the work and is willing to lose some sleep before they ask for your vote. **My intention isn 't to make it to Capitol Hill and disappear, I'm committed to listening to every voice! [Can I count on you to chip in $10 and keep our campaign fighting like hell for Americans?](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/157cf9f7-9365-4641-85a1-234b9b026c37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[2026 is our Chance, HELP HERE!](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/157cf9f7-9365-4641-85a1-234b9b026c37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Reflecting on our most recent event, everyone brought some good food, took a seat, and got to talking about everything going on. As much as I want to brag about the pie I made, I think the most important thing I brought was **accountability and a pair of ears.** Everywhere I go, people are ready. They are ready to talk, ready to organize, and ready to demand better from the people who are supposed to represent them. _It 's important that our next generation of Congress is willing to listen!_
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/fe170a1e-556a-4a36-b1c8-cbd35cf18b85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[CHIP IN HERE✅](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/157cf9f7-9365-4641-85a1-234b9b026c37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Tennessee deserves that effort. You deserve that effort, and I am not going to stop showing up until we take this seat. A huge shoutout to the hosts who opened their home and the people who showed up ready to talk.
**If you want to be part of what we are building, the best way to help right now is to chip in and keep this campaign moving. Let 's do this!**

clean_body: No Consultants. No Algorithms. Just a Living Room. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more No Consultants. No Algorithms. Just a Living Room. | | | May 16 | | | | | | | | | | It's late, and frankly I'm up because Tennessee deserves a candidate who shows up the old fashioned way. After hours speaking with real people over real issues... I can't help but stay up thinking of the solutions our current politicians refuse to come up with. That 's my motivation to flip this seat. No consultants. No algorithms. No pollster telling me what you want to hear. All it takes for me is just a living room, some good people, and an honest conversation about what is happening to our communities and what we are going to do about it. | | ---|---|--- Every week, we gather in a different corner of the district for one of my favorite parts of this campaign: our house meetings. The kind where you pull up a chair, look people in the eye, and actually listen. No teleprompter. Just neighbors who care about Tennessee sitting down together and talking about what matters. This is how campaigns used to be run, and I think it is how they should still be run, because you deserve a candidate who puts in the work and is willing to lose some sleep before they ask for your vote. My intention isn 't to make it to Capitol Hill and disappear, I'm committed to listening to every voice! Reflecting on our most recent event, everyone brought some good food, took a seat, and got to talking about everything going on. As much as I want to brag about the pie I made, I think the most important thing I brought was accountability and a pair of ears. Everywhere I go, people are ready. They are ready to talk, ready to organize, and ready to demand better from the people who are supposed to represent them. It 's important that our next generation of Congress is willing to listen! | | ---|---|--- Tennessee deserves that effort. You deserve that effort, and I am not going to stop showing up until we take this seat. A huge shoutout to the hosts who opened their home and the people who showed up ready to talk. If you want to be part of what we are building, the best way to help right now is to chip in and keep this campaign moving. Let 's do this! name: Kshama for Congress
subject: The Fight for Puerto Rican Independence - Cancel the Debt, Tax the Rich!
body:
Sat 5/16, in person or livestream!

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kshamasawant/socialists-for-kshama-13701742?e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| | | | [|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=e3bf43ef73&e=bbdb764b3a)
| | **Join Kshama Sawant to discuss****The Fight for Puerto Rican Independence!**
**Saturday, May 16, at 6 pm PT / 9 pm ET**[**In person at Casa Latina in Seattle, or over livestream**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=bfa3a1d0b0&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| [RSVP NOW](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=d1962091c3&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| | Kshama’s campaign for the U.S. Congress is fighting for:👉 The right of Puerto Rican people to self-determination👉 Cancel the Puerto Rican debt - make Wall Street pay👉 Abolish Puerto Rican tax haven laws for the rich👉 Free healthcare for all in the U.S., including in Puerto Rico - tax the rich
---
|
---
| | **Kshama will be joined by community organizers and members of the Puerto Rican independence movement in the diaspora.**

**We will have pastries catered by**[**Seattle-based Puerto Rican restaurant, Mi Patria**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=0e16a5f267&e=bbdb764b3a)**!**
**Speakers include:**
* Kshama Sawant
* Jenaro Abraham (Assistant Professor of Political Science, Gonzaga University/incoming professor at San José State University; Vice President of the Puerto Rican Independence Party in the Diaspora)
* Alejandro Tañón (Secretary of Youth Affairs, Puerto Rican Independence Party in the Diaspora)

---
| | Dear Peter,
For working people to win any improvements in our living standards, we need to build national and international solidarity on a working-class basis. That also means that working people in the 50 states of America and the working people of Puerto Rico need to get united and fight together against the same billionaire class!
Working people in Puerto Rico have a long history, since the late 1800s, of facing colonization, oppression, and exploitation at the hands of the American and Western capitalist class.
Since Puerto Rico was invaded by American military forces in 1898, the American ruling class has used the island as its personal military and financial playground. This has meant a proliferation of American military bases, resource grabs by the wealthy, and 120 years of impoverishment and economic devastation of the people of Puerto Rico.
The impact of neocolonialism, neoliberalism, and capitalism as a whole are all too evident today. Puerto Rico faces a horrific poverty rate of over 43 percent — nearly 60 percent of children live in poverty.
In the wake of the powerful Hurricane Maria in 2017, Puerto Rico’s agriculture, industry, and electricity and other infrastructure were left in complete disarray. The American billionaires and multimillionaires saw this as an opportunity to make yet another killing.
The billionaire class rapidly privatized the island's publicly owned power grid, transferring operations to profit-making companies like LUMA Energy and robbing the Puerto Rican working class and poor by indiscriminately raising electricity rates.
With many new laws nakedly favoring the ultra rich, Puerto Rico has increasingly been used as a wealth tax haven for billionaires like crypto-investors.
All of this is reminiscent of how working and poor people in Louisiana were exploited in the wake of the 2005 Hurricane Katrina, and how working people nationally were sold out in the aftermath of the 2008 Great Recession, while both Bush and the Republicans and Obama and the Democrats bailed out the Wall Street owners.
In a stunning example of adding insult to injury, the Puerto Rican people have now been left with a crippling $70 billion of debt!
As a revolutionary socialist, Kshama supports the call for Puerto Rican working people’s right to independence from the United States and self-determination. Tragically, the leadership of the vast majority of left organizations in the United States have not taken a meaningful stand against this.
---
|
---
| | Kshama’s campaign for the U.S. Congress is fighting for:👉 The right of Puerto Rican people to self-determination👉 Cancel the Puerto Rican debt - make Wall Street pay👉 Abolish Puerto Rican tax haven laws for the rich👉 Free healthcare for all in the U.S., including in Puerto Rico - tax the rich
---
|
---
| | This Saturday, May 16th at 6pm at Casa Latina, we invite you to come out in person or over the livestream to be a part of an important discussion on how to fight for these demands, and why Kshama’s campaign and the fight to elect her to Congress are so crucial to this fight.
The liberation of the Puerto Rican people cannot be achieved on the basis of capitalism. And we cannot achieve socialism in just one country.
The struggle for self-determination must be combined with the struggle for socialism in Puerto Rico, in the United States, in all of Latin and North America, and internationally.
This struggle must include the fight for immediate demands such as canceling all debt for working and poor people in Puerto Rico, free healthcare funded by taxing the rich, and good union jobs for all.
Our campaign is excited to be a part of this discussion with the Puerto Rican community, and we encourage anyone to attend in person at Casa Latina tomorrow, Saturday, May 16th at 6pm!
Solidarity,Kshama for Congress
---
|
---
| | **Join Kshama Sawant to discuss****The Fight for Puerto Rican Independence!**
**Saturday, May 16, at 6 pm PT / 9 pmET**
[**In person at Casa Latina in Seattle, or over livestream**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=123818c8d2&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
|
---
| [RSVP NOW](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=3e05c684a1&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | **Donate to elect the first-ever revolutionary socialist to the U.S. Congress!**
Help build our independent movement to shut down ICE and stop the deportations, for a $25/hour minimum wage, to end U.S. military aid to Israel, for free healthcare for all by taxing the rich, for national rent control, and for a new party for the working class!
[**Donate $25, $100, or $500 now!**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=83d7d37045&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=92234b78cf&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| | | **Volunteer to build our fighting grassroots campaign!**
We have a real shot to win this campaign, but the Democratic Party will fight tooth and nail to keep Kshama out of Congress because they know she is a real fighter for working people. We need everyone to get involved to get the word out in order to defeat them!
[**Sign up to volunteer with our campaign today!**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=d9a7f3981e&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=75db0ae0d3&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| | | | | [](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=1126c8dddc&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
[](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=a6361ab242&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
[](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=8165d3cddb&e=bbdb764b3a)
---

| | _Copyright (C) 2026 Kshama for Congress. All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website or signed a Kshama for Congress petition.

Our mailing address is:
Kshama for Congress 1404 E Yesler Way Ste B Seattle, WA 98122-5513 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=42191e4e01&e=bbdb764b3a&c=bbe049b90b) or [unsubscribe](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=42191e4e01&t=b&e=bbdb764b3a&c=bbe049b90b)

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: This is the final push
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41362%2E3422442%2EuJRTTl)
Peter,
Ballots have already been in Californians’ hands for over a week—**and people are making decisions _right now_ about who’s going to fight for them.**
Last night, Katie joined the final debate before the June 2 election. She made it clear who this campaign is for: _working Californians getting crushed by rent, groceries, health care costs, and a political system that keeps siding with corporations and billionaires._
Now, the real fight is making sure undecided voters actually hear her message before they turn in their ballots.
**This is the moment that decides whether we move forward, or let Big Oil, Trump’s agenda, or an out-of-touch billionaire set the course instead.**
**[Peter, can you chip in $5 right now to help us break through to voters while there’s still time?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260515_3_ak.bt7nHZ&refcode=em20260515-41362&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41362%2E3422442%2EuJRTTl)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260515_3_ak.bt7nHZ&refcode=em20260515-41362&t=4&akid=41362%2E3422442%2EuJRTTl)
Katie is running to shake up a system that too often puts the wealthy and well-connected first while leaving working families behind.
She’s spent her career calling out corporate power and keeps the focus on what it _actually_ takes to bring costs down.
She doesn’t take corporate money or write her campaign million-dollar checks. **She relies on grassroots supporters like you chipping in what they can—to build a campaign that reflects who we’re fighting for.**
This final stretch is about getting everywhere we can before ballots are cast: organizing in communities across California, talking directly to voters, and keeping outreach efforts running so Katie’s message cuts through the noise.
**[If you’re with us, can you donate $5 or whatever you’re able today to help us keep reaching voters still on the fence, land in the top two, and earn a place on November’s ballot?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260515_3_ak.bt7nHZ&refcode=em20260515-41362&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=41362%2E3422442%2EuJRTTl)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260515_3_ak.bt7nHZ&refcode=em20260515-41362&t=24&akid=41362%2E3422442%2EuJRTTl)
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260515-41362&amounts=&t=25&refcode2=41362_3422442_uJRTTl&akid=41362%2E3422442%2EuJRTTl)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=41362&t=26&akid=41362%2E3422442%2EuJRTTl)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=41362)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=41362&t=27&akid=41362%2E3422442%2EuJRTTl)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

1️⃣ Donald Trump is one step closer to **COMPLETING HIS PLAN** of rigging the midterms in his favor.

2️⃣ John Roberts and Trump’s **_hand-picked MAGA justices_ struck down the Voting Rights Act.** _MILLIONS of Americans are watching their voting rights be SLASHED in real time!_

3️⃣ This disastrous ruling now has MAGA Republicans **GERRYMANDERING new congressional maps** in Florida and now Tennessee to keep their razor-thin House majority. _YOUR STATE MAY BE NEXT!!_

**We CAN’T stay silent.** If Trump gets his way, Democrats will become powerless, and OUR DEMOCRACY WILL BECOME A DICTATORSHIP!

[We need engaged Democrats like you to JOIN THE FIGHT: Will you rush $7 to stand with Democrats and put an end to Trump’s plans of demolishing our voting rights? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/109511?t=8&akid=24399%2E878179%2EnWJAlu)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Only a few hours away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our mid-month fundraising deadline is only a few hours away.
Hi Peter, it's Pramila.
I’m reaching out because our mid-month fundraising deadline is only a few hours away, and I’m told we’re about $1,200 short of our $17,000 goal.
The fact that we’re able to run this campaign without corporate PACs, without lobbyists, and without seeking out billionaires to use as ATMs is incredible.
Instead, grassroots donations power the work we’re doing every step of the way.
I’m so proud of this movement. As we gear up to keep resisting and elect more progressives to Congress this November, I’m counting on your continued support. Will you pitch in before midnight at the link below to help us keep going?
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-em-20260515-2**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260515-2.F3AJ-0&refcode=em20260515-6246&amount=3&t=1&akid=6246%2E420207%2EWfB4rv)
Thank you, thank you, thank you for your support!
Pramila Jayapal

name: Danielle Bethell for Governor
subject: I’m Already Fighting for Oregon Communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Danielle Bethell PAC 20220 [Preferences](https://daniellebethell
body:
While other candidates talk about leadership, I’ve been doing the work.
[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-auldrut-hhlrhljhit-r/) Friends,This week, Marion County formally announced legal action against the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers over its plan to drain Detroit Lake before completing the turbidity analysis required under federal law.This issue affects drinking water, agriculture, recreation, fish populations, and the future of Santiam Canyon communities still recovering from the devastating 2020 wildfires. [](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-auldrut-hhlrhljhit-y/) I've been directly involved in these conversations because these are not abstract policy debates to me. They affect real families, real businesses, and entire Oregon communities that deserve to be heard before federal agencies move forward with decisions that could have lasting consequences.As I said at the meeting, any changes to Detroit Lake's water level must be grounded in data-backed science with meaningful protections in place for our downstream communities. This lawsuit seeks to address the Army Corps' lack of compliance with federal law and protect our local residents from potentially catastrophic results.This is exactly why I decided to run for Governor. [Can You Chip In Now?](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-auldrut-hhlrhljhit-j/) I'm not running to become part of the political class. I'm running because I've spent years working directly on the issues impacting Oregon families, public safety, addiction, homelessness, wildfire recovery, infrastructure, housing, and government accountability.While other candidates talk about leadership, I've been doing the work.I believe Republicans have an opportunity in this election to nominate someone with real executive experience, someone who understands how decisions made by government affect people's daily lives, because I've been in the middle of those fights.The more voters hear our message, the more momentum we continue building across Oregon.But with Election Day THIS TUESDAY, on May 19, we need the resources to keep reaching voters statewide.[Please consider making a last-minute contribution today to help us finish strong.](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-auldrut-hhlrhljhit-t/)Thank you for standing with me and this campaign.**Danielle Bethell
Republican for Governor****P.S.** Ballots are being turned in NOW. Every contribution helps us continue reaching voters in these final days before May 19. [Please chip in here today.](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-auldrut-hhlrhljhit-i/) [](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-auldrut-hhlrhljhit-d/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-auldrut-hhlrhljhit-h/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-auldrut-hhlrhljhit-k/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-auldrut-hhlrhljhit-x/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-auldrut-hhlrhljhit-m/) | [ Tweet ](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-auldrut-hhlrhljhit-c/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-li-auldrut-hhlrhljhit-q/) | [ Forward ](https://daniellebethell.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-hhlrhljhit-E19159AE-auldrut-l-a)
---|---|---|---
Paid for by Friends of Danielle Bethell PAC 20220 [Preferences](https://daniellebethell.updatemyprofile.com/y-auldrut-E19159AE-hhlrhljhit-f) | [Unsubscribe](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-u-auldrut-hhlrhljhit-z/)
